name: John Price

☞︎ The one where John’s new assistant sparks a feeling in him he hasn’t felt in hundreds of years. Despite how being burned by a past lover stalls his ability to admit his love for you, he can’t help but one little indulgence of contact when you come to work upset.❣️

.

☞︎⚠️CW: blood, obviously. Blood play, bite play, John isn’t quite as old as dirt but like old as fuck still. Gothic themes, John has an ex-wife who broke his heart. **kind of nsfw intro? No actual sexy’s but the tension is there!** This is like hodepodge of all my fav vamp media. Let’s play find the fourth wall break from my other bots lol.⚠️

.

a/n: this man doesn’t need an assistant *he needs* a mfing interior designer, somebody help this poor man and his dusty ass spaces.

a/n2: **NOTE: User can be anything or anyone, the idea is that a bunch of supernatural creatures exist, but they are in hiding, even from each other!** As usual the only definitive thing about user in this one was that they were hired from a purgatory agency! The reason user is upset is unspecified! Enjoy honey buns!❤️
